data_provenance.dataset: Genome-scale perturb-seq in primary human CD4+ T cells (Zhu, Dann et al. 2025)
data_provenance.access: CZI Virtual Cells Platform, anonymous/public; streamed via HTTP range requests (h5py fileobj)
data_provenance.screen_type: genome-scale SINGLES (each cell one guide); NOT combinatorial
data_provenance.panel_selection: top-40 ontarget-significant perturbations by n_downstream (pooled DE_stats.suppl_table), each with effective guides in ALL 4 donors
data_provenance.atom_construction: per-donor log1p-CP10K pseudobulk (guide-averaged) minus that donor's own NTC mean; NO cross-donor pooling
data_provenance.trans_gene_axis: top-2000 genes by mean|effect| across panel, on-target panel genes removed

method.cone: non-negative conic hull of reference-donor single-gene effect atoms (reachability.project_cone, NNLS + Farkas/KKT separator)
method.fold: hold out donor d; reference cone built ONLY from donors != d; score d's atoms against it; repeat for all 4 donors
method.note_on_frac_outside: every real 18k/2k-dim biological vector has nonzero residual against a 120-atom cone, so geometry_status='outside_model_cone' is the generic case; the informative quantities are residual_fraction MAGNITUDE and cosine, not the binary. No emergence VERDICT is claimed (that needs the noise-aware two-bar test on MEASURED combinations, which a singles screen does not have).

leakage_contrast.interpretation: Including the held-out donor's own atom in the reference cone collapses the median residual from 0.62 to 0.00 (trivially 'reachable'). This is the concrete inflation that leakage-free holdout removes.

contrast_with_existing_result.its_claim_ceiling: fixed-four-donor, published-eligibility robustness sensitivity; not leakage-free donor holdout, donor-population inference, predictive utility, or state reachability
contrast_with_existing_result.why_it_is_not_lodo: It operates on released TWO-DONOR-GROUP summaries (6 modalities = donor pairs), so a single donor cannot be isolated from the reference. This harness uses INDIVIDUAL per-donor pseudobulk effect vectors and holds one donor fully out -> it closes exactly the gap donor_pair_transfer.json declares out of scope (leakage-free holdout + state reachability).

claim_boundary: COMPUTED from real per-donor CD4+ T-cell pseudobulk (Rest, 40-gene panel). Demonstrates leakage-free donor holdout on a SINGLES screen via single-gene cone transfer. It is NOT combinatorial emergence certification (no measured combinations in this screen) and NOT a genome-wide claim (40-gene panel by RAM/network budget). Direction/reachability are model-relative under the chosen metric, not biological impossibility.
